switch_tip: After enabling, users will receive the specified content when following the official account. This feature only supports official account replies.
msg_default_reply_limit: Only 3 messages can be sent within 1 minute after following. It is recommended not to exceed 2 auto-replies. You can set replies separately based on follow source or time period.
msg_duration_priority: Priority range is 1-100. Smaller numbers indicate higher priority. Trigger priority: Time-based > Source-based > Default.
label_verified_only: This feature only supports verified official accounts/service accounts
tooltip_priority: Priority values must be unique. Smaller numbers indicate higher priority
tooltip_switch_status_message: When enabled, the specified content will be replied based on message type
tooltip_switch_status_duration: When enabled, the specified content will be replied according to the set time period
msg_please_save_first: Please save the current rule first
modal_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
modal_close_confirm: After closing, this feature will be disabled and all official account menus will be stopped. Confirm to close?
